pilot_signal_strength.evidence: 7/7 Theorem 1 predictions confirmed across 84 runs; VGG null 0.157% (4 methods); NoBN Cohen's d=9.14

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H1 rho~0.5 confirmed; H2 binary masking cost confirmed 7/7; H5 VGG confirmed 4/7 methods; H6 directionally correct despite seed_42 anomaly

path_to_full_result.evidence: Theorems 1+2 empirically grounded; rho_high failure blocks Gate 2 and Scenario A; paper viable at Scenario B (7.5-8.0) without rho_high

novelty.evidence: Theorem 1: 9/10; Theorem 2: 8/10; Theorem 3/PMP-WD: 8/10 dual derivation; Proposition 1: 7/10; SPWD: 8/10

resource_efficiency.evidence: Core CIFAR done; rho_high re-run + VGG 3 methods needed (~6-8 GPU-hours total)

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: No pilot run attempted — zero direct evidence

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H10 not falsified (no data); novelty confirmed (8/10)

path_to_full_result.evidence: Implementable in ~30 LOC; 18 GPU-hours pilot; deferred to P1-B

novelty.evidence: 8/10; first rank velocity WD; AlphaDecay differentiation clear

resource_efficiency.evidence: Requires P0 completion first; 18 GPU-hours additional

reasons: Theorem 1 has 7/7 out-of-sample predictions confirmed across 84 independent runs — production-quality confirmation, not pilot evidence
VGG-16-BN Gate 1 null result confirmed for 4/7 methods with phi_spread=0.157%, far below 0.5% threshold
VGG constant: 92.050%, cwd_hard: 92.057%, half_lambda: 92.147%, cosine_schedule: 91.990% — all within 0.157% range
rho_high failure is a launch infrastructure issue (empty directory), not a training failure — must re-run
Matched-rho SGD seed_42 anomaly (76.12%) is almost certainly a divergence/misconfiguration; seeds 123/456 are consistent at ~90.9%
Paper viable at Scenario B (7.5-8.0) with current data; Scenario A (8.0-8.5) requires rho_high and PMP-WD pilot
SPWD has zero pilot evidence — backup status is correct and appropriate; no basis to displace front-runner

rho_high.issue: Empty directory — run never started or exited immediately without output
rho_high.action_required: Re-launch with wd=5e-3, gradient clipping max_norm=5.0, ResNet-20/CIFAR-10/AdamW, 200 epochs, 4 methods x 3 seeds

rho_low.note: Only constant done; other methods needed for phi_spread

next_actions.action: Re-run rho_high (rho=5.0): wd=5e-3, ResNet-20/CIFAR-10/AdamW, 200 epochs, 4 methods x 3 seeds, gradient clipping max_norm=5.0. Fix the launch issue in full/rho_sweep/cifar10/rho_high/.
next_actions.impact: Unlocks Gate 2, enables PMP-WD pilot, enables Scenario A (8.0-8.5)

next_actions.action: Launch missing VGG methods: swd (seeds 123,456), no_wd (all seeds), random_mask (all seeds). 9 runs on 3 GPUs in parallel.
next_actions.impact: Completes Gate 1 fully; provides full 7-method phi_spread for VGG

next_actions.action: Investigate matched-rho SGD seed_42 anomaly (76.12%). Re-run constant/seed_42 to confirm. Launch cwd_hard/seeds_123_456 and no_wd/all_seeds.
After Gate 2: implement PMP-WD (lambda*(t) = clip(kappa*(rho* - rho_hat_t)+, 0, lambda_max)) and pilot at rho=5.0, 3 seeds x 200 epochs.
next_actions.impact: Theorem 3 experimental validation; needed for Scenario A

next_actions.action: Execute writing fixes W1-W10 (p-value annotations, figure regenerations, cross-reference consistency) in parallel with experiments.
next_actions.impact: Improves paper quality; not gated on experiment completion

next_actions.action: SPWD pilot (P1-B): only after P0 completion and within compute budget. SGD CIFAR-10 ResNet-20 x 3 seeds x 200 epochs.
next_actions.impact: Optional: adds backup algorithm evidence; do not delay core experiments

dropped_candidates: cand_spwd is not dropped — it is queued at backup/P1 priority. No evidence warrants dropping it.

scenario_forecast.scenario_b: Current data (Theorems 1+2, VGG partial, NoBN, rho_low) supports 7.5-8.0 paper score
scenario_forecast.scenario_a_path: rho_high re-run success + PMP-WD pilot showing benefit at rho=5.0 -> 8.0-8.5
scenario_forecast.scenario_c_risk: rho_high shows null even at rho=5.0 -> reframe as 'structural BN invariance is robust across 100x rho range' -> still publishable 7.0-7.5
